name: Boddu Sai Ganesh Reddy
title: AI/ML Engineer & Full-Stack Developer
bio: AI/ML Engineer with hands-on experience developing production-ready intelligent systems using Generative AI, Large Language Models, and advanced machine learning techniques. Expertise in building multi-modal AI applications, Agentic AI systems with multi-agent orchestration, RAG pipelines, computer vision, and NLP systems. Strong foundation in deep learning frameworks (PyTorch, Hugging Face Transformers), natural language processing, and full-stack development. Recognized as GHCI 2025 Hackathon Finalist for innovative AI-powered verification system achieving 99% performance improvement. Currently pursuing B.Tech in CSE at VIT-AP University (CGPA 8.88/10).

highlights: Engineered and launched MedVault, a full-stack hospital management web application with AI-powered features serving administrators, doctors, and patients
Developed secure stateless REST API using Java Spring Boot with JWT-based authentication and role-based access control
Built dynamic responsive UI with ReactJS creating multi-page dashboard for appointment booking, patient management, and feedback collection
Designed and optimized MySQL database schema using JPA and Hibernate for complex entity relationships
Implemented Spring Security framework for authentication and authorization across application layers

projects.name: AI-Powered KYC Verification System
projects.description: GHCI 2025 Hackathon Finalist — Production-ready KYC platform reducing identity verification from 2-7 days to 5-10 seconds (99% faster, 95% cost reduction). Features industry-first bias detection with live EEOC 80% Rule fairness monitoring, Google Gemini AI for multi-modal document OCR, facial recognition, liveness detection, and 6-layer security architecture.

projects.name: AI-Powered MD&A Generator
projects.description: Agentic AI system with multi-agent orchestration (Critique Agent, Risk Detection Agent, Comparative Analysis Agent) for automated financial report generation from SEC statements. RAG pipeline using ChromaDB with HuggingFace embeddings, 14+ KPI metrics, 6-layer guardrails, and 95%+ factuality scores.

projects.name: Tesco Creative Studio
projects.description: Tesco Retail Media Hackathon — Full-stack AI-powered creative builder for guideline-compliant retail media. Features AI background removal using rembg (U-2-Net), 18-rule compliance validation engine, Google Gemini for text compliance and AI-powered layout suggestions, interactive Fabric.js canvas editor.

projects.name: Crime Information Extraction System
projects.description: Unified crime text analysis platform combining deep learning intensity prediction with rule-based entity extraction. Custom BertWithFeatures model integrating BERT transformer with 6 handcrafted SpaCy features for crime severity classification on 1-5 scale.

projects.name: Your Health Compass
projects.description: Advanced Agentic RAG system using ChromaDB vector store and Tavily AI for real-time web searches and intelligent health document retrieval. Google Gemini for AI-powered decision-making with context-aware answers and automatic source citations.

projects.name: ChatQuick Chrome Extension
projects.description: Modern Chrome Extension providing on-demand AI assistance with dynamic injectable UI for browser automation. AI browser agent that parses live DOM to programmatically execute tasks including clicks, form filling, and document generation.

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering
highlights: Relevant Coursework: ML, DL, AI, NLP, Computer Vision, DSA

certifications: Introduction to Web Development with HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript
achievements: GHCI 2025 Hackathon Finalist — AI-Powered KYC Verification System
Gold Medal — Inter-University Martial Arts Championship (2024)
Club Manager — Dragon Fist Martial Arts Club, VIT-AP (150+ members)
